User id of the dedicated stream client. The Director UI provides a user picker.
GLUNIVERSE_STREAM.settings.autoStartStre: Stream user ids that should enter stream mode automatically without prompting.
GLUNIVERSE_STREAM.settings.trustedDirect: User ids allowed to operate stream controls in addition to GMs.
GLUNIVERSE_STREAM.settings.uiRules.name: Stream UI Rules
GLUNIVERSE_STREAM.settings.uiRules.hint: Allow/block rules for detected floating UI and expert CSS selectors.
GLUNIVERSE_STREAM.keybindings.emergencyR: Temporarily restore or hide Foundry UI while stream mode remains active.
GLUNIVERSE_STREAM.startPrompt.title: Start Stream Mode?
GLUNIVERSE_STREAM.startPrompt.body: This user is configured as the stream client. Start stream mode for this session?
GLUNIVERSE_STREAM.startPrompt.alwaysHint: Always enter stream mode on this user at startup. A Stream Director can revoke this later.
GLUNIVERSE_STREAM.notifications.notDirec: You are not allowed to operate stream controls.
